about.title: About
about.description: Sparkixe is a project development brand founded by Numixe. We create digital products — from e-commerce to mobile and desktop apps and more — with an obsession for detail and users/clients satisfaction.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce + SVG Configurator
ecommerce.description: Full e-commerce platform with an interactive SVG configurator enabling product customization.

cocktail.title: Shake It!
cocktail.description: Android app to discover, save and share cocktail recipes. Coming soon to the Play Store.

desktop.title: Desktop App - Tablet
desktop.description: Tablet desktop application built with C# using WPF and .NET, designed for a smooth user experience on unstable networks.
